ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CJackHwang/ds2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CJackHwang/ds2api
Language: go
Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumNous/new-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumNous/new-api
Language: go
A unified AI model hub for aggregation & distribution. It supports cross-converting various LLMs into OpenAI-compatible, Claude-compatible, or Gemini-compatible formats. A centralized gateway for personal and enterprise model management. 🍥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaMetrics
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaMetrics
Language: go
VictoriaMetrics: fast, cost-effective monitoring solution and time series database

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: canopy-network/canopy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/canopy-network/canopy
Language: go
The official go implementation of the Canopy Network protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chenhg5/cc-connect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chenhg5/cc-connect
Language: go
Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudwego/eino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudwego/eino
Language: go
The ultimate LLM/AI application development framework in Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dagger/dagger
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dagger/dagger
Language: go
Automation engine to build, test and ship any codebase. Runs locally, in CI, or directly in the cloud

ns0:entry.ns0:title: everywall/ladder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/everywall/ladder
Language: go
Selfhosted alternative to 12ft.io. and 1ft.io. Proxy to remove CORS headers and modify HTML

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/beads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/beads
Language: go
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k0sproject/k0s
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k0sproject/k0s
Language: go
k0s - The Zero Friction Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meshery/meshery
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meshery/meshery
Language: go
Meshery, the cloud native manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: minio/minio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/minio/minio
Language: go
MinIO is a high-performance, S3 compatible object store, open sourced under GNU AGPLv3 license.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opencloud-eu/opencloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opencloud-eu/opencloud
Language: go
🌤️ OpenCloud is the open source platform for file management, sharing and collaboration. Simple and sovereign.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: richkuo/go-trader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/richkuo/go-trader
Language: go
Crypto trading bot — backtesting, paper trading, live trading with risk management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seaweedfs/seaweedfs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seaweedfs/seaweedfs
Language: go
SeaweedFS is a distributed storage system for object storage (S3), file systems, and Iceberg tables, designed to handle billions of files with O(1) disk access and effortless horizontal scaling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siderolabs/talos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siderolabs/talos
Language: go
Talos Linux is a modern Linux distribution built for Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: steipete/gogcli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/steipete/gogcli
Language: go
Google Suite CLI: Gmail, GCal, GDrive, GContacts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: volcano-sh/volcano
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/volcano-sh/volcano
Language: go
A Cloud Native Batch System (Project under CNCF)
